discharge_transmittal.author: Reviewing Attorney
discharge_transmittal.basis: enclosure is a discharge of mortgage subject to the 33 M.R.S. § 551 recording (60-day) and mortgagor-mailing (30-day) duties; the transmittal recital asks the registry to return the recorded original so the mailing duty can be met

enclosures: Our firm's check no. 1088 in payment of the recording fee.
